title: Screening Canine Feces with the MICROSEQ® Salmonella spp. Detection Kit
author: Sarah Nemser

steps.title: Using a tongue depressor, aseptically weight...
steps.instruction: Using a tongue depressor, aseptically weight 10 g of fecal sample into a Whirl-Pak‱ bag

steps.title: Add 90 mL of ambient temperature buffered peptone water (BPW)
steps.instruction: Add 90 mL of ambient temperature buffered peptone water (BPW)

steps.title: Mix the fecal sample in the bag
steps.instruction: Mix the fecal sample in the bag. Use the necessary quantity of pre-enrichment medium to yield a 1/10 dilution with feces

steps.title: Preparation of Plates for KingFisher Duo or Flex
steps.instruction: Preparation of Plates for KingFisher Duo or Flex

steps.title: Sample Plate Label 1 Kingfisher 96...
steps.instruction: Sample Plate Label 1 Kingfisher 96 DW plate as “Sample" Add 20 µL of Bead Mix to the wells containing the unknown samples Carefully add 300 µL of pre-enriched fecal sample supernatant to each well containing bead mix. Do not disturb pellet in Bead Tube. Add 150 µL of 100% Isopropanol to the wells containing the unknown samples

steps.title: Wash 1 Plate Label 2 Kingfisher...
steps.instruction: Wash 1 Plate Label 2 Kingfisher 96 DW plates as “Wash 1” Add 300 µL of Wash Solution 1 to the wells corresponding to those containing unknown samples from the sample plate

steps.title: Wash 2 Plate Label 2 Kingfisher...
steps.instruction: Wash 2 Plate Label 2 Kingfisher 96 DW plates as “Wash 2” Add 450 µL of Wash Solution 2 to the wells corresponding to those containing unknown samples from the sample plate

steps.title: Elution Plate Label 1 96 well...
steps.instruction: Elution Plate Label 1 96 well plate as “Elution” Add 75 µL of Elution Buffer to the wells corresponding to those containing unknown samples from the sample plate

steps.title: Tip Plate Place one 96 well...
steps.instruction: Tip Plate Place one 96 well DW tip comb onto a Kingfisher 96 200 ul plate Take caution not to contaminate the surface of the tip comb

steps.title: Dilution Plate Label 1 96 well...
steps.instruction: Dilution Plate Label 1 96 well plate as “Dilution” Add 90 µL of Nuclease Free H20 to the wells corresponding to those containing unknown samples from the sample plate

steps.title: Set up KingFisher Program according to...
steps.instruction: Set up KingFisher Program according to the KingFisher Duo or Flex Protocol MagMax Pathogen Standard Volume

steps.title: Load KingFisher instrument with the Wash,...
steps.instruction: Load KingFisher instrument with the Wash, Sample, and Elution plates as directed by the machine protocol

steps.title: Preparing the DNA
steps.instruction: Preparing the DNA

steps.title: Transfer 10 ul of unknown sample...
steps.instruction: Transfer 10 ul of unknown sample from the Elution plate to the Dilution plate

steps.title: The DNA is 1:10 dilution and ready for PCR
steps.instruction: The DNA is 1:10 dilution and ready for PCR

steps.title: Remove 300 µL fecal sample to a 1
steps.instruction: Remove 300 µL fecal sample to a 1.5 ml tube; centrifuge at highest speed for 3 min and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 100 µL PrepMan Ultra Sample Preparation Reagent

steps.title: Incubate at 100°C for 10 min;...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 100°C for 10 min; centrifuge at highest speed for 3 minutes

steps.title: Dilution of DNA - automated extraction...
steps.instruction: Dilution of DNA - automated extraction recommends starting with a 1:10 dilution. If inhibitors are suspected, subsequent serial dilutions may be made.

steps.title: Use immediately or store at -20°C until use
steps.instruction: Use immediately or store at -20°C until use.

steps.title: Preparing the assay beads
steps.instruction: Preparing the assay beads

steps.title: Remove the appropriate number of individual...
steps.instruction: Remove the appropriate number of individual tubes or 8-tube strips, one tube for each reaction that you plan to run.

steps.title: Gently remove, then discard the colored caps
steps.instruction: Gently remove, then discard the colored caps. Avoid disturbing the beads from the bottom of the tubes.

steps.title: Add 25 µL of Nuclease free H20 to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL of Nuclease free H20 to each tube

steps.title: For each unknown sample or control,...
steps.instruction: For each unknown sample or control, transfer 5 µL of the 1:10 diluted DNA to each tube

steps.title: Cap the tubes, sealing each tube...
steps.instruction: Cap the tubes, sealing each tube with the transparent optical strip caps provided in the kit, using the MicroAmp‱ 96-Well Base and the MicroAmp‱ Cap Installing Tool if necessary.

steps.title: Confirm that the strips are straight...
steps.instruction: Confirm that the strips are straight and that each tube is in line with the adjacent tube.

steps.title: RapidFinder Express Software
steps.instruction: RapidFinder Express Software: RapidFinder ‱ Express Software | Thermo Fisher Scientific - US

steps.title: Open RapidFinder Express Software
steps.instruction: Open RapidFinder Express Software

steps.title: Select a Run File Option specific to project
steps.instruction: Select a Run File Option specific to project

steps.title: Enter Run File Information
steps.instruction: Enter Run File Information

steps.title: Select Target Check Enter the number...
steps.instruction: Select Target Check Enter the number of unknown samples Enter at least 1 for the # of negative controls for each assay Enter at least 1 for the # of positive controls for each assay

steps.title: Enter Unknown sample Names
steps.instruction: Enter Unknown sample Names

steps.title: Confirm Run Layout
steps.instruction: Confirm Run Layout

steps.title: Start Instrument Run
steps.instruction: Start Instrument Run

steps.title: Incubated at 37 °C ± 1...
steps.instruction: Incubated at 37 °C ± 1 °C for 18 h ± 2 h.

steps.title: KingFisher Protocols can be found on ThermoFisher website
steps.instruction: KingFisher Protocols can be found on ThermoFisher website: https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/AM1840

steps.title: KingFisher equipment will give an estimated...
steps.instruction: KingFisher equipment will give an estimated completion time for protocol once loaded

steps.title: Once complete keep extracted undiluted and...
steps.instruction: Once complete keep extracted undiluted and diluted DNA samples at -20C for possible follow up

steps.title: MagMAX Total Nucleic Acid Isolation Kit...
steps.instruction: MagMAX Total Nucleic Acid Isolation Kit manufacture protocol MagMAX™ Total Nucleic Acid Isolation Kit Manufacturer Protocol.pdf

steps.title: Preparation of solutions
steps.instruction: Preparation of solutions

steps.title: PCR Assay- MicroSeq® Salmonella spp
steps.instruction: PCR Assay- MicroSeq® Salmonella spp. manufacture protocol MicroSEQ Salmonella PCR Detection Kit Manufacturers Protocol.pdf

steps.title: PrepMan Ultra Manufacturers Protocol
steps.instruction: PrepMan Ultra Manufacturers Protocol.pdf

steps.title: Add 12 mL 100% Isopropanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 12 mL 100% Isopropanol to the bottle labeled “Wash Solution 1 Concentrate”

steps.title: Add 32 mL 100% Ethanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 32 mL 100% Ethanol to the bottle labeled “Wash Solution 2 Concentrate”

steps.title: Add 360 µL Carrier NA to...
steps.instruction: Add 360 µL Carrier NA to the bottle labeled “Lysis/Binding Solution Concentrate”; Label as “Lysis/Binding Solution” (this is stable at room temperature for 1 month)

steps.title: Add 1100 µL NA Binding Beads...
steps.instruction: Add 1100 µL NA Binding Beads to a 15 ml tube. Add 1100 l Lysis/Binding Enhancer to the 15 ml tube; Dispense 1000 μL into 1.5ml tubes. Label as “Bead Mix” (this is stable at 4 º C for 2 weeks)

steps.title: Dispense 200 µL Lysis/Binding Solution into...
steps.instruction: Dispense 200 µL Lysis/Binding Solution into a Bead Tube for each unknown sample

steps.title: Add 300 µL of the pre-enriched...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of the pre-enriched fecal sample to each Bead Tube

steps.title: Vortex unknown samples using Vortex adapter...
steps.instruction: Vortex unknown samples using Vortex adapter for 15 minutes at highest setting (caps should face the center of the adapter)

steps.title: Leave Whirl-Pak‱ bags at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Leave Whirl-Pak‱ bags at room temperature until PCR results are available

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,000 rcf for 3 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 rcf for 3 min

steps.title: Protocol requires Pathogen High Volume program
steps.instruction: Protocol requires Pathogen High Volume program

steps.title: 7500 Software v2
steps.instruction: 7500 Software v2.3

steps.title: Program the ABI 7500-FAST machine with...
steps.instruction: Program the ABI 7500-FAST machine with the following settings (use fast mode):

steps.title: A B C D 1 Run...
steps.instruction: A B C D 1 Run Parameters Reps Temperature Duration (sec) 2 Holding Stage 1 95 C 20 3 Cycling Stage 1 40 95 C 03 4 Cygling Stage 2 40 60 C 30

steps.title: Place Samples in ABI-7500 FAST thermocycler...
steps.instruction: Place Samples in ABI-7500 FAST thermocycler using the tube strip adapter. Balance the tubes on each side according to the manufacturer’s instructions (blank tubes may be used for this purpose if necessary). If you do not have this adapter or are using a different machine, you can transfer the reactions into a plate that is compatible with your setup if needed.

steps.title: Start the run
steps.instruction: Start the run.

steps.title: Following run, analyze the results using the automatic analysis setting
steps.instruction: Following run, analyze the results using the automatic analysis setting. All samples should have a VIC (internal control) signal. If the VIC is >35 or undetermined, repeat the PCR using a 1:5 dilution of the sample in nuclease-free water and interpret based on the result that gives the lowest Ct for the VIC.

steps.title: Save a copy of the original...
steps.instruction: Save a copy of the original run file and export the data into an Excel file. Interpret the results according to the following guidelines:

steps.title: Set the Threshold by selecting the...
steps.instruction: Set the Threshold by selecting the Positive Control wells, switch Graph Type to Linear, and manually place Threshold bar at the start of the exponential curve.

steps.title: A B C D 1 FAMa...
steps.instruction: A B C D 1 FAMa VICb Interpretation Action 2 undetermined detected Not Detected None - this result is final 3 disregard Positive Culture Confirmation is optional 4 ≥ 35 detected Suspect Culture Confirmation is optional 5 undetermined undetermined Inconclusive Culture Confirmation is optional

steps.title: Run samples using RapidFinder Express OR 7500 v2
steps.instruction: Run samples using RapidFinder Express OR 7500 v2.3 software.

steps.title: For a 1:10 dilution, Transfer 5...
steps.instruction: For a 1:10 dilution, Transfer 5 µL of the supernatant to a 1.5 mL tube and add 45 µL nuclease free water.

steps.title: For a 1:100 dilution, Transfer 5...
steps.instruction: For a 1:100 dilution, Transfer 5 µL of the supernatant to a 1.5 mL tube and add 495 µL nuclease free water. This is the historical option for manual DNA extraction, if this is what has worked in the past, you may go directly to a 1:100 dilution .
